texto: I was in the situation of someone who has assumed, all his life, that madness was on eway, and suddenly in its grip, discovers that it is not only different from the way he'd imagined but that the person suffering from it is someone else, and that this someone else is not interested in finding out what madness is like: he is simply immersed in it, or it has descended on him, and that's that.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Felisberto Hernández: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I was in the situation of someone who has assumed, all his life, that madness was on eway, and su…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, madness, someone pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.

texto: I do not believe that I should only write about what I know but that I should write also of the other.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Felisberto Hernández sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “I do not believe that I should only write about what I know but that I should write also of the o…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, writers, writing, útil em momentos de writing.
